internal.title: Internal error
internal.message: Something went wrong on the server.
internal.developerHint: Check server logs for the underlying cause chain.

invalid_input.title: Invalid input
invalid_input.developerHint: Inspect `data.field` (when present) and the cause chain for the Zod issue list.

permission_denied.title: Permission denied
permission_denied.message: Permission "{{permission}}" is required but not granted.
permission_denied.developerHint: Add the named permission to your plugin manifest and reload the plugin.

plugin_config_invalid.title: Plugin config invalid
plugin_config_invalid.developerHint: Check the cause chain for the underlying Zod issues.

manifest_invalid.title: Manifest invalid
manifest_invalid.developerHint: Check the cause chain for the underlying Zod issues.

manifest_missing_main.title: Manifest missing entry point
manifest_missing_main.message: Plugin manifest "{{manifestPath}}" has no entry point.
